reviews.author: Anil Chugh
reviews.review_body: Worst school. Senior male students don't have any manners how to talk to female teachers. When they come out, they start shouting badly, using bad language. Don't know what they are learing in this school.

reviews.author: protagonist
reviews.review_body:
If you want a school to belittle your every effort, demand more hours from you despite paying you like a beggar, an organization that has no set principles and regulations to abide by, does not stand by the contract agreement that you have signed, and want you to teach the spoiled kids studying here then this is just the place for you.
Apparently this is not desirable for me.
Too manipulative for such a D-grade school.
Let's begin with the people.
Ruchi can be termed as the female equivalent of the less evolved animal from the said phylum.
The woman lacks the sense and sensibility. (No reference to the movie and no pun intended). Though it is laughable that they feel themselves to be at power when they are in a position at a school which has little existence and acknowledgement.
Ofc then, people like us, educated from convents and graduated from top universities, with published papers and articles and books, wouldn't take a modicum of disrespect from third graders like them.

reviews.author: Zuned Ahmed
reviews.review_body: This school should be last in options. Please note they will not refund your fee. So don't hurry in paying your fee. The seats are always available.

reviews.author: Akash Gupta
reviews.review_body: Excellent experience in this school.... Teachers are very experienced and are very helpful... They cleared all our doubts... Memories of this school that I really appreciate and always remain in my heart..🙏
